metadata.description: Production-grade NestJS authentication & authorization scaffolder. JWT + Passport, OAuth2-style permissions, role matrix, refresh tokens, throttling — generated into your project in one guided flow.

plugins.name: nestjs-auth-bootstrap
plugins.description: Scaffold a complete NestJS auth system: AuthModule + JWT strategy + global CompositeAuthGuard + decorators (@Public, @RequirePermission, @CurrentUser) + OAuth2-style Permission enum + ROLE_PERMISSIONS matrix + refresh tokens + ThrottlerGuard. Supports Mongoose, TypeORM, Prisma, and stub repositories.
